hooks.command: node -e "const p=process.env.TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; const bad=['cricclubs-stats.js','all-api-calls.json','stats-raw.json']; const hit=bad.find(b=>p.endsWith(b)); if(hit) process.stderr.write('WARNING: Read '+hit+' — this file is large and auto-generated. Use the Data Shape Reference in CLAUDE.md instead.\n');"
